name: handoffkit
description: Design and scaffold reliable handoffs for coding agents. HandoffKit helps model agents as actors with mailboxes, select-style waits, routed ownership transfer, pub/sub broadcasts, fan-in joins/quorums, budgets, dead letters, bounded handoffs through corpus references, and message-level tracing. Includes language-agnostic architecture guidance plus a Go reference runtime scaffolder.

interface.shortDescription: Build safer multi-agent systems with explicit handoffs
interface.longDescription: HandoffKit helps design multi-agent systems that coordinate by explicit messages instead of a shared coordination scratchpad. Use it to reason about agents as actors with private state, addressable mailboxes, select-style waits, point-to-point routing, broadcast brokers, fan-in joins/quorums, ownership transfer, cancellation, budgets, dead letters, and complete message-level traces. Made by https://dyng.ai
defaultPrompt: Use handoffkit to design a message-passing multi-agent system.
Use handoffkit to scaffold the Go runtime primitives into this repo.
